INTERNSHIP

Codsoft

Role UI/UX Intern
Duration Feb '24 - Mar '24
Focus Area Prototyping
Tools Figma

The Challenge

Designing modern, engaging, and responsive web page layouts that improve user experience. Tasks involved creating wireframes and high-fidelity prototypes for various web applications.

The Solution

Successfully designed multiple portfolio-ready UI mockups, including a Netflix clone UI. Utilized Figma to create interactive prototypes and applied UI/UX best practices, greatly enhancing practical design expertise.

Codsoft UI
